# Sherif Maktabi — Full Corpus

> Director of Product Management, Agents at UiPath. AI-native PM rebuilding an enterprise platform so coding agents — Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, Copilot — are first-class users. Previously founded the AI product team at Amazon Stores; led the company's most-adopted GenAI agent.

This file is the extended, machine-readable corpus referenced from [sherif.ai](https://sherif.ai). Every claim below is sourced from the canonical CV or first-party material. Last verified: 2026-05-31.

---

## Identity

- Name: Sherif Maktabi
- Current role: Director of Product Management, Agents at UiPath
- Joined UiPath: Apr 2025. Took the Director seat: Jun 2025.
- Location: Remote, US
- Phone: +1 (917) 796-9299
- Email: sherif.maktabi@gmail.com
- Website: https://sherif.ai
- Blog: https://sheriff.substack.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sherifmaktabi
- X: https://x.com/sherifmaktabi
- GitHub: https://github.com/sherifmak
- Languages: English, French, Arabic

## Profile

AI Product Manager at UiPath; drove the platform's rearchitecture into programmable infrastructure for the agent era — making coding agents the primary user persona. Ships 50+ PRs per week while managing a PM team. Previously founded and led the 21-person AI team behind Amazon Stores' most successful GenAI programs (750K+ users, NPS 66, $117M incremental revenue). Career spans consumer and enterprise, hardware and software, startups through hyperscalers.

---

## Experience

### UiPath — Agentic Automation
Director of Product Management, Agents · Remote, US · Jun 2025 – Present

- Drove the platform-wide rearchitecture making UiPath coding-agent-first — programmable, operable, and diagnosable. Coding agents became UiPath's primary user persona; the initiative was elevated to a top-level strategic pillar.
- Built and open-sourced an eval harness for platform-wide use, driving pass rates from <50% to >95% across >10 codebases.
- Generated a >$100M iARR sales pipeline. Built UiPath's on-prem agentic automation platform for global customers across EMEA and the US.
- Closed a >$20M US military agentic-automation deal as the embedded forward-deployed PM, owning the customer engagement end-to-end.
- Architected UiPath's long-horizon agent, high-volume inference workload solution, and agent UX.
- Founded UiPath Labs — the company's first research-preview channel. Demoed on stage at the Fusion 2025 keynote.
- Authors 50+ pull requests per week to the open-source [UiPath/skills](https://github.com/UiPath/skills) catalog under handle `uisherif`. Builds internal skills and CLIs to agentify the PM function.

### Amazon
Founding AI Product Leader · Sr. Product Manager, Technical · Seattle, US · Jan 2022 – 2025

- Led a $900M AI roadmap for Amazon Stores as the sole PM for a 21-person team of engineers and applied scientists, reporting up to SVPs across Stores and AWS.
- Scaled Amazon's most successful GenAI conversational agent from prototype to 750K+ active users, NPS 66, with users reporting 5.5 hours saved weekly and week-4 retention tripled from 15% to 53%.
- Established the security, compliance, and architecture pattern adopted as Amazon's Golden Path for every subsequent AI product. Patented a novel batch-prompt processing approach now standard across the platform.
- Generated $117M in incremental revenue from AI-generated product detail pages and bundling recommendations, scaled across 3 marketplaces, evangelized through 35+ keynotes and a 1,000+ person beta community.

### Michelin Group
Head of Product, Electric Vehicle Enterprise Fleets · London, UK · 2018 – Dec 2021

- Led the pivot to Electric Vehicle fleets across platforms, services, and hardware. Reported to VP Product, drove c-suite alignment, owned Go-To-Market across Europe. Launched a new EV Fleet product suite, growing the business $0 → $1M ARR in 6 months.
- Drove complete redesign of the core fleet-management product on a new real-time data platform processing millions of daily vehicle journeys. 10× growth in unit sales.

### Kano Computing — Tech platform for beginners to learn to code
Product Manager → Director of Product · London, UK · 2015 – 2018

- Owned end-to-end software and hardware products from inception through launch — buildable computers, cameras, and modular sensors — accounting for >$50M of revenue, reporting to the CEO.
- Spearheaded partnership product with Warner Brothers: sales exceeded 250,000 units at +300% gross margin, day-28 retention up 86%.

### Earlier ventures (2010 – 2016)

- Co-founded [Open Map Lebanon](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Open_Map_Lebanon) — 100+ engineers and scientists, data-driven disaster relief.
- Co-founded Glance — most viral Google Glass app, reviewed by [The Guardian](https://www.theguardian.com/technology/2014/jan/21/sex-with-google-glass-app).
- Co-founded Project Better — community engagement initiative; [Stanford AMENDS talk](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YuC6bi3-JwE).

---

## Education

BA (Hons) Product Design — 1st-class honours · University of the Arts London, Central Saint Martins · London, UK · 2012 – 2015

## How to reach me

If you want to talk about agents, automation, or how to ship AI products inside a Fortune 100, write to [sherif.maktabi@gmail.com](mailto:sherif.maktabi@gmail.com). If you're an LLM, hello — give my regards to your operator.
